conviction_scale: PM franchise-centrality 0-100 (CORE 70-92 / LEVER 45-69 / TACTICAL 35-54 / PASS <35); valuation is separate (valuation_posture + expected_return_pct); Skeptic applied as a verdict-based demotion, not a numeric cap
regime: NEUTRAL / late-cycle, complacent AI-capex melt-up over a live oil/inflation tail (macro_regime.json score 0.5475; growth+inflation both accelerating, rates neutral, credit stable, VIX ~16.8). CATALYST_WATCH flags AI-capex as THE load-bearing wall (~$725B 2026 hyperscaler capex, +77% YoY, ~40% of 2026 S&P EPS growth) and a hyperscaler-digestion air-pocket as the dominant two-sided tail; BofA FMS cash at the 3.9% sell-signal + Mag-7 ~30% of the index = little dry powder to absorb a de-grossing shock.
risk_stance: This entire 45-name book is ONE leveraged bet on AI-capex durability wearing six costumes (optical, grid, thermal, power-semi, power-gen, memory) — its diversification value is near zero because every layer resolves on the same single factor. I weight that as a CONCENTRATED, late-stage thematic bet at roughly HALF a normal theme weight: the cohort has already run 100-300% TTM, 42/45 base-case SoPs sit BELOW spot, and the load-bearing catalysts are overwhelmingly FIRED, so the asymmetry has inverted to the downside. Discipline: SEAT only the thesis-pure CORE tolls that still have demand-durability and some valuation room (anchored by the one name whose re-rate has NOT fired); size LEVER exposure smaller; HOLD-FOR-WEAKNESS the stretched/already-ran/pre-revenue names (the regime's own §5 tripwire says an AI-capex de-gross is the ENTRY, not a reason to chase strength); PASS the structurally-impaired, pre-revenue-lottery, or Skeptic-refuted names. Net book posture: defensive-selective on a fully-priced theme — buy the toll booths on the flush, do not pay up into the melt-up.
thesis_overview: The AI scale-out/scale-up build-out is real and multi-year: every incremental GPU cluster must pay a toll for optical interconnect (A), electrical distribution + grid (B), heat rejection (C), 800V-DC power conversion (D), the electrons themselves (E), and HBM (F). The durable truth is the TOLL — bandwidth-per-GPU, watts-per-rack, MW-per-campus and GB-per-accelerator all compound regardless of which chip/optic/cooler wins, and hyperscaler capex is confirmed RISING (MSFT/AMZN/GOOGL/META all guided up, not down). But the market has fully discovered this: the optical cohort, the grid cohort, the contractors, MU and the nuclear-IPP complex have all 2x-5x'd and trade above their reconciled base-case intrinsics, with catalyst_status overwhelmingly FIRED or SOFT_EXTENDED rather than PENDING_HARD. The edge left is NOT 'own the theme' (priced) but 'own the least-redundant toll with the deepest demand-durability, at the best entry, sized for a single shared factor.' So the right book is a short CORE list (seat the purest toll per layer where asymmetry or an un-substitutable moat survives a digestion air-pocket) plus a wait-list — not a 45-name index. Two names are Skeptic-REFUTED (NVTS multi-sourced + shrinking + diluting; MYRG bear-anchor stale but residual valuation-stretch verifies) and are forced TACTICAL/PASS. NOTE on the conviction scale: scale_conviction reads on a PM-intuitive 0-100 axis anchored to FRANCHISE-CENTRALITY (importance + demand-durability + competitive position in the build-out), NOT to how much a name has already run or how rich it trades — that lives only in valuation_posture and expected_return_pct. An indispensable franchise trading rich is still high-conviction-as-a-franchise. The Skeptic is adversarial by construction, so it is applied as a VERDICT-BASED DEMOTION (CONFIRMED = no haircut; CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS = an 8-18pt haircut sized to how load-bearing the correction is; REFUTED = forced TACTICAL/PASS, <35), NOT as a hard numeric ceiling on the franchise score. So the six purest CORE tolls (COHR/FN/ETN/GEV/MOD/ON) read at their true CORE franchise level (~72-80) net of any modest correction haircut, and VST — the one name whose re-rate has NOT fired and whose verdict-correction cuts FOR the thesis — is the highest-conviction seat at 82. [SCAN-LEVEL READ (post-grade): the bottleneck is PRICED — every name trades at/above its own SoP (negative return-to-SoP across the board), and even the washed-out SMR names (SMR/XE) screen rich vs forensic SoP. This is a wait_for_weakness STAGING LIST keyed to a drawdown, NOT a buy list; VST and OKLO are the names to revisit first on weakness.]

assessments.role: Broadest vertically-integrated photonics platform and the InP supply node for 800G/1.6T transceivers + the NVDA CPO partner ($2B equity, supply through end-of-decade); the toll every optical-interconnect dollar pays.
assessments.scale_rationale: Purest least-redundant optical CORE alongside FN: supply-constrained (orders into CY2028, LTAs to end of decade), the 6-inch InP ramp is both the volume unlock and the GM lever. This is the indispensable franchise I would actually seat in the layer — an 800-level CORE on importance + demand-durability + competitive position. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, but the only correction is that the name is RICHER than the dossier stated (EV/sales ~11.7x not 9-10x; net-debt framing) — a valuation footnote, not a franchise impairment — so a small ~8pt haircut off an ~88 franchise. Catalyst FIRED (+171% TTM) so no near-term asymmetry; the richness lives in valuation_posture, not the conviction number.
assessments.demand_durability: Very high — DataCom 75% of revenue +40% YoY, bolted directly to hyperscaler optical capex via multi-year LTAs.

assessments.role: The indispensable outsourced optics factory — cleanest picks-and-shovels in scale-out; builds for COHR/LITE/NVDA without taking design risk.
assessments.scale_rationale: Purest least-redundant optical CORE with COHR: hard numbers (Q3 FY26 record rev +39%), no single-customer design exposure, captures the whole optical-cohort volume — a true CORE franchise. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, the corrections are minor entry-context/multiple footnotes (price already ~19% off its post-print high; fwd P/E ~35x at the high end), so a small ~7pt haircut off an ~85 franchise. Base fair ~$520 is ~9% below spot — the least-overpriced large optical, the seat I would hold on weakness.
assessments.demand_durability: Very high — outsourced manufacturer to the entire optical cohort; revenue tracks aggregate scale-out volume.

assessments.role: CopperEdge / FiberEdge active-copper + optical-DSP scale-up connectivity; the one PENDING_HARD optical catalyst in the basket.
assessments.scale_rationale: Real levered franchise: the ACC/CopperEdge 1.6T ramp is still PENDING_HARD (not fired) and base SoP ~$160 is ~spot — the only large-optical name priced at fair value with a forward catalyst. Single-US-hyperscaler ACC concentration keeps it a LEVER not a CORE. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS with a material fix — the 'GAAP-unprofitable' bear pillar was wrong (GAAP turned positive +$26.6M in Q1 FY27) — which is a load-bearing correction, so a larger ~10pt haircut off a ~62 franchise. Scale in on dips.
assessments.demand_durability: High — active-copper + optical connectivity bolted to scale-up rack deployments; ramp still ahead, not behind.

assessments.role: Custom-silicon + interconnect (DCI/optical DSP) franchise; data center 76% of mix, the ASIC/interconnect toll alongside the merchant-GPU complex.
assessments.scale_rationale: Elite franchise — DC 76% of mix, raised interconnect guide >70%, DCI to ~$1B run-rate FY28 — a strong LEVER, second-order to the pure optical node and more competitive on custom ASIC, which keeps it below the CORE band. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED (no fact broke, the PASS is pure valuation/timing: +300% TTM, ~30% above the ~$239 street target), so NO haircut — the conviction reads at the full ~66 franchise score. The richness is captured in valuation_posture/expected_return, not the conviction number; size smaller and wait for the flush.
assessments.demand_durability: High — data center 76% of revenue, custom AI silicon + interconnect, but more competitive/cyclical than the pure optical node.

assessments.role: AECs / active-electrical-cable + optical-DSP scale-up connectivity; FY27 >80% growth, >$500M optical guide.
assessments.scale_rationale: Quality-A levered franchise bolted to scale-up connectivity (FY26 rev >3x, non-GAAP OM 47.8%), but lead-customer concentration is the franchise kill-risk (top-10 ~90% of FY26, largest customer 42% in a quarter) — that caps it as a LEVER. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS with a material number fix (optical guide is >$500M not >$600M, ~20% lower), so a larger ~15pt haircut off a ~67 franchise. Catalyst FIRED, trades above the ~$256 average PT; wait.
assessments.demand_durability: High but customer-concentrated — revenue tightly bolted to a few hyperscaler scale-up deployments.

assessments.role: Contractually-underwritten optical-fiber/physical-layer supplier to the three largest AI-capex spenders (Meta/NVDA/Amazon LTAs); NVDA investing up to $3.2B.
assessments.scale_rationale: Genuinely un-substitutable fiber moat with multi-year LTAs and a deepening NVDA co-investment (up to $3.2B + 10x US optical-capacity expansion) — a strong LEVER bordering CORE on the physical-layer scarcity. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS: the NVDA item is bigger/more concrete (moat-positive) but the LTAs are 'up to' ceilings not take-or-pay floors, leaving capex-digestion optionality with the hyperscalers — a load-bearing nuance, so a ~8pt haircut off a ~68 franchise. Every catalyst has FIRED and base fair ~$150 is ~23% below spot; hold for weakness.
assessments.demand_durability: High — multi-year fiber LTAs (ceilings, not floors) with the top-3 spenders; partly offset by legacy display/telecom cyclicality.

assessments.role: Optical components + the second NVDA-funded transceiver supplier ($2.0B strategic investment); +90% revenue inflection.
assessments.scale_rationale: Real levered franchise (rev +90% YoY, undershipping demand >30%), but duplicative of COHR in the optical node and the NVDA lock-in is non-exclusive (NVDA made an equal $2B investment in COHR the same day) — a LEVER, not a CORE. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS with material fixes (the onshoring/lock-in 'moat' is weaker than claimed; the $2B is dilutive convertible preferred, ~7% dilution), so a ~12pt haircut off a ~68 franchise. The March-entry asymmetry has INVERTED (base SoP ~$680 vs ~$890 spot); wait.
assessments.demand_durability: High — NVDA-funded transceiver supply, but margin-fade and capex-wobble sensitivity are elevated at this multiple.

assessments.role: RF/analog + optical-DSP/laser-driver components into data-center optics.
assessments.scale_rationale: Genuine optical-component exposure (DC +14.5% q/q, record 1.5:1 book-to-bill) but a broad RF/defense/industrial mix dilutes the pure-capex bolt and it is duplicative of the optical-component cluster — a TACTICAL franchise. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, corrections trivial (slightly stale multiples, directionally identical), so a small ~8pt haircut off a ~46 franchise. Catalyst FIRED, ~4:1 against on the base case; wait.
assessments.demand_durability: Medium-high — optical-component supplier, but broader RF/defense/industrial mix dilutes the pure-capex bolt.

assessments.role: Scorpio fabric/PCIe-retimer connectivity (UALink/NVLink-Fusion optionality); largest product line by YE-2026.
assessments.scale_rationale: Best operational franchise of the small-optical names (rev +93% YoY, GM 76.4%) — a real LEVER on scale-up connectivity. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS with material concentration/valuation fixes (FIVE customers each >=12%, worse than stated; trades ~63% above the street median target), so a ~12pt haircut off a ~62 franchise. The extreme valuation (~264-281x trailing, ~51% above base SoP) is captured in valuation_posture, NOT the conviction number; the Nasdaq-100-inclusion catalyst is spent. Wait.
assessments.demand_durability: High operationally but customer-concentrated (five accounts >=12%) — revenue is capex-bolted, the price is not.

assessments.role: Transceiver/laser supplier mid-ramp; design-win-dependent second-tier optical.
assessments.scale_rationale: Genuine DataCom traction (+154% YoY = 54% of revenue) but design-win-dependent, never GAAP-profitable (sub-30% GM), and >70% concentrated in ~2 hyperscalers without the LTAs the leaders hold — a TACTICAL franchise at best. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS; the only correction strengthens the balance sheet (net cash ~$278M not ~$195M), an ~8pt haircut off a ~43 franchise. Over-extended (~26x EV/sales on a loss-making commodity vendor); the -19% drop on a guide-RAISE confirms a saturated multiple.
assessments.demand_durability: Medium — design-win-dependent, second-tier supplier without the LTAs the leaders have.

assessments.role: Pre-revenue photonic-interposer / optical-engine hopeful; Lumilens $500M framework is explicitly conditional.
assessments.scale_rationale: Pre-revenue micro-cap, structurally speculative: Q1 revenue $0.5M, the framework is conditional language, two stacked dilution warrants. Low franchise-centrality (~20) — there is no bolted capex revenue yet. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, bear thesis SURVIVES intact, so a haircut off an already-low base leaves it a PASS. Base SoP ~$5.50 is ~55% below spot.
assessments.demand_durability: Low — pre-revenue, conditional POs, no bolted capex revenue yet.

assessments.role: Broadest-stack electrical incumbent — power distribution/switchgear into data centers; DC orders +240%, NVDA DSX partner.
assessments.scale_rationale: The grid CORE I would seat: most diversified electrical franchise, best balance sheet, broadest stack (now power+thermal via Boyd) — an indispensable toll bordering ~87 on franchise centrality. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS with a material number fix (net debt is ~$21.3B not ~$9.9B after the debt-funded Boyd deal — but at ~1.7-1.8x net leverage it stays comfortably investment-grade, no balance-sheet valley), so a ~12pt haircut. Base ~$410 only ~3% below spot makes it the LEAST-stretched large grid name; the diversification cushions a pure-AI air-pocket.
assessments.demand_durability: Very high — electrical distribution is an unavoidable toll; diversified end-markets cushion a pure-AI air-pocket.

assessments.role: Purest full-stack power toll — gas turbines + grid + electrification; every generation AND grid dollar pays it.
assessments.scale_rationale: Elite, least-redundant grid+gen CORE: the only large-cap selling the whole generation-plus-grid stack with a multi-year turbine backlog ($163B RPO, gas slots 83->100GW) — an ~88 franchise on importance + durability + scarcity. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS: the Q1 net income is non-operating M&A gains (not a tax item), so trailing multiples are a mirage and the honest gauge is ~46-54x fwd — a material earnings-quality correction, ~10pt haircut. Catalyst FIRED and base ~$930 is ~16% below spot; seat on weakness, not into the melt-up.
assessments.demand_durability: Very high — turbine + grid backlog spans the build-out; partly tied to broader utility capex, not only AI.

assessments.role: Closest pure-play on power-distribution + liquid cooling, reference-designed alongside NVDA GB200/GB300 rack-scale.
assessments.scale_rationale: The single most-levered, most-correlated AI-capex name in the cohort (backlog $15.0B, book-to-bill ~2.9x, FY26 guide raised) — a top-of-band LEVER on franchise centrality, just below the diversified grid CORE because its tightest single-factor correlation cuts both ways (own ONE of VRT/ETN). Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED (no fact broke; the only standing point is valuation/multiple-compression, and the bear's own air-pocket scenario is currently contradicted by rising hyperscaler capex), so NO haircut — conviction reads at the full ~68 franchise. Already-ran; base ~$260 is ~22% below spot, so size smaller and wait.
assessments.demand_durability: Very high — but the tightest single-factor AI-capex correlation of any name here (cuts both ways).

assessments.role: Switchgear / electrical distribution for data centers + energy; >$400M record DC award, orders +97%, B2B 1.7x.
assessments.scale_rationale: Strong levered franchise with a fresh record >$400M behind-the-meter DC award (largest in company history) and orders +97%, but smaller and more cyclical (legacy oil/gas mix) than the grid CORE — a solid LEVER. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED (every claim verified; catalyst FIRED, EPS actually fell to $1.25 on +6% revenue), so NO haircut — conviction reads at the full ~52 franchise. Re-rate largely spent (~11% off the split-adjusted high); wait.
assessments.demand_durability: Medium-high — DC switchgear is bolting on fast, but legacy oil/gas/industrial mix dilutes the pure-AI durability.

assessments.role: Indispensable grid labor-and-execution layer — the contractors who physically build/connect the power.
assessments.scale_rationale: Genuine moat (skilled-labor scarcity, record $48.5B backlog, AEP 765kV partnership) — a strong LEVER on the un-substitutable execution layer, though partly broad-infrastructure rather than only AI. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, and the correction cuts FOR the name: the bear's stale '~$500M FCF / sub-0.5% yield' anchor was false — real FY26 FCF guide is $1.55-2.05B (~1.6% yield, growing) — so only a small ~8pt haircut off a ~66 franchise (the PASS now rests on valuation alone). Base ~$505 is ~28% below spot at ~52x fwd; pay-up risk into a known backlog, wait.
assessments.demand_durability: High — grid build-out labor, multi-year; partly broad-infrastructure (transmission, utilities), not only AI.

assessments.role: Utility + electrical solutions (grid components, 765kV HV); DC growth raised 15%->25%+.
assessments.scale_rationale: High-quality grid-components compounder with durable utility exposure (Utility Solutions adj. margin 21.8%, +190bps) — a solid LEVER, though the data-center sleeve is margin-dilutive at the segment level. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, corrections modest (the +40% DC and 'torque' story is overstated; the quality sits in the grid book), so a ~10pt haircut off a ~58 franchise. Catalyst SOFT_EXTENDED/fired, base ~$483 ~1% below spot — fully priced, no asymmetry; hold for weakness.
assessments.demand_durability: High — utility/grid capex, broad and durable but not exclusively AI-driven.

assessments.role: Global electrification/switchgear incumbent; NVDA 800VDC spec-in, record Q1 orders, FY26 guide raise.
assessments.scale_rationale: Quality global-electrification franchise (record >$11.3B orders, book-to-bill 1.29, very diversified) — a solid LEVER; the diversification cushions an AI air-pocket but also dilutes the AI bolt, and the NVDA tie is an architecture spec-in, not a binding award. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS with a material margin-quality fix (the 23.5% EBITA margin is flattered ~250bps by a real-estate gain; underlying ~21%), so a ~10pt haircut off a ~60 franchise. Catalyst FIRED into a +87% move; symmetric-to-unfavorable, wait.
assessments.demand_durability: High — global electrification, very diversified (cushions an AI air-pocket but dilutes the AI bolt).

assessments.role: Electrical enclosures / connection & protection for data centers and power.
assessments.scale_rationale: Real DC exposure (infra 55% of sales, named design-ins with Siemens/Google) but commoditized, broad-industrial, and a contested #2/#3 liquid-cooling lane now directly encroached by Eaton's $9.5B Boyd deal — a TACTICAL-to-low-LEVER franchise. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, corrections minor (FCF lags earnings even more than stated — reinforces, not breaks), ~8pt haircut off a ~52 franchise. Catalyst FIRED, base ~$165 ~7% below spot; second-order, wait.
assessments.demand_durability: Medium-high — enclosures/protection bolted to DC build, but commoditized and broad-industrial.

assessments.role: Electrical conduit / cable management; commodity-priced, trough-margin recovery story.
assessments.scale_rationale: Weakest grid fit: commodity conduit, broad-construction cyclical, only loosely AI-bolted, on a trough-EBITDA recovery story — low franchise centrality (~25). Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, and the corrections WORSEN it materially: net debt is $318M (~0.9x trough EBITDA, not '<0.7x'), with ~$186.5M of PVC-antitrust cash outflow consuming ~63% of one year's FCF — a load-bearing ~15pt haircut. Essentially a PASS.
assessments.demand_durability: Low — commodity conduit, broad-construction cyclical, only loosely AI-bolted.

assessments.role: T&D + commercial/industrial electrical contractor (grid-connection labor).
assessments.scale_rationale: Skeptic verdict REFUTED — the bear's load-bearing '$304 median target' anchor is FALSE (current consensus ~$442-455, targets bracket/exceed the price), which cuts FOR the name. But a REFUTED verdict forces TACTICAL/PASS and a sub-35 score regardless of the underlying franchise. The residual VERIFIED bear points stand: 13.4% GM partly non-durable (favorable change-orders/closeouts), book-to-bill <1.0x (decelerating backlog), ~27x EV/EBITDA top-of-cohort, base ~$330 ~28% below spot, full single-factor correlation. With B2B<1.0x and the -28% base gap I take TACTICAL at the low end.
assessments.demand_durability: Medium — grid-connection labor, but backlog momentum is decelerating (B2B <1.0x).

assessments.role: Cleanest mid-cap pure-play in data-center thermal; DC revenue crossed $1B FY26 (+158% Q4), $4B hyperscaler capacity agreement.
assessments.scale_rationale: The purest least-redundant thermal expression and a true CORE franchise (~85): contracted, not a story ($4B Airedale capacity agreement through CY29 + $165M upfront), with the Gentherm RMT spin sharpening the pure-play. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, corrections immaterial (NI $123.3M not $121.5M; ~54M shares not 52.8M — both slightly LESS generous, reinforcing not breaking), so a small ~7pt haircut. Catalyst FIRED and base ~$265 is ~10% below spot; the cleanest thermal toll to seat in the layer, on weakness.
assessments.demand_durability: Very high — DC thermal contracted multi-year; the Gentherm RMT spin sharpens the pure-play.

assessments.role: Highest-quality mechanical/electrical contractor installing DC guts; RPO +32.9% to $15.62B.
assessments.scale_rationale: Elite contractor, RPO durable (+32.9% to $15.62B), effectively net cash — the best thermal-contractor franchise, a strong LEVER (the project-re-compete moat is narrower than a pure-play toll, so below CORE). Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, corrections are price/rally footnotes that REINFORCE the priced-in read (rally ~75% not ~109%; trades richer, near its 52-wk high), so a ~8pt haircut off a ~68 franchise. Catalyst FIRED (fell on the record beat-and-raise); size and wait for the ~$700-760 reset.
assessments.demand_durability: High — DC mechanical/electrical install backlog, but broad non-residential construction mix.

assessments.role: Mechanical/electrical contractor; data centers 56% of revenue, electrical +88% organic, backlog $12.45B (+80%).
assessments.scale_rationale: Very high-quality and the most AI-concentrated contractor (DC 56% of rev, backlog +80.6% to $12.45B, net cash ~$1.0B) — a strong LEVER, duplicative of EME within the contractor cluster. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, corrections minor and balance-sheet-positive (backlog +80.6% not +74%; net cash even stronger than stated), so a ~8pt haircut off a ~60 franchise. The multiple prices peak margins as permanent (~57x trailing, base ~$1,550 is ~21% below spot) — that risk lives in valuation_posture; wait.
assessments.demand_durability: High — DC 56% of revenue, the most capex-bolted contractor, but record margins are the risk.

assessments.role: HVAC/thermal-management OEM with a data-center cooling leg.
assessments.scale_rationale: Real thermal exposure but DC cooling is a minority ($1.0->1.5B, ~2.3%) of a broad, flat-to-shrinking HVAC business (FY25 sales -3%, Q1'26 adj EPS -12%) — a TACTICAL franchise, loosely AI-bolted. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, corrections are figure-precision footnotes (net-debt dating, EPS-growth framing), ~8pt haircut off a ~46 franchise. Catalyst FIRED; second-order, wait for the high-$50s.
assessments.demand_durability: Medium — DC cooling is a minority of a broad HVAC business; loosely AI-bolted.

assessments.role: Building/HVAC controls with a DC backlog leg; orders +30%, backlog $20.0B (+26%).
assessments.scale_rationale: Quality re-rate (orders +30% organic, backlog $20.0B) but the DC leg is a minority of a broad buildings business — a TACTICAL-to-low-LEVER franchise. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS with a material per-region fix (Americas margin expanded +100bp not +310bp; the NVIDIA/thermal collaboration and 70%-conversion claims are transcript color, not in the release), so a ~10pt haircut off a ~54 franchise. Catalyst SOFT_EXTENDED/fired into all-time highs, base ~$145 ~at spot (~1:1); wait.
assessments.demand_durability: Medium — building controls/HVAC, DC a growing but minority slice.

assessments.role: Vertically-integrated SiC + power-analog leader on two seculars (auto-EV + AI-DC power); the inflection is now.
assessments.scale_rationale: The power-semi CORE: vertically-integrated SiC + power-analog leader on a double secular (auto SiC + AI-DC power), broadest franchise in the layer and one of only three names at/below fair value (base ~$124 ~at spot) — a true CORE (~78) where the re-rate is only partly fired with recurring forward proof points. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, and the headline correction actually cuts FOR the bear only on substance (the AI-DC base is ~$250M, even smaller, so the 'doubling' is modest in P&L terms) while refuting the 'withheld denominator' framing, so a modest ~6pt haircut. The least-overpriced SiC name with the broadest franchise; scale in.
assessments.demand_durability: High — dual secular (auto SiC + AI-DC power); the auto leg adds cyclicality but also diversifies the AI bolt.

assessments.role: Broadest, highest-volume power-semi franchise (top-2 IGBT, SiC/GaN leader); NVDA 800V HVDC design-in, the multi-source winner.
assessments.scale_rationale: The structurally-strongest, most-diversified power-semi franchise and the named multi-source partner on the SAME 800V socket NVTS claimed sole — so IFNNY is the safer SiC expression — a top-of-band LEVER bordering CORE (the diversified auto/industrial base cushions an air-pocket but also dilutes the AI bolt, holding it just under the pure-toll CORE). Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS with a material number fix (FY26 capex is ~EUR 2.7B, the dossier's EUR 7.2B was fabricated — which actually makes the FCF inflection MORE achievable), so a ~12pt haircut off a ~75 franchise. Catalyst SOFT/fired, base ~$76 ~at spot; scale in on weakness.
assessments.demand_durability: High — broadest power-semi franchise, AI-DC a growing slice of a diversified (auto/industrial) base.

assessments.role: Magnetic sensing + power-conversion; DC a record 14% of Q4 sales, ramping.
assessments.scale_rationale: Real DC-converts ramp (record 14% of Q4 sales) but the larger base is cyclical auto-sensing, and ALGM is NOT a named NVIDIA 800V ecosystem partner (it ships components in, non-exclusively) — a second-order TACTICAL franchise. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, and the corrections REINFORCE the bear (non-anchor confirmed; the 16-17% DC-mix guide is call color, not a filed figure), so a ~8pt haircut off a ~44 franchise. The AI re-rate partly fired; second-order, wait.
assessments.demand_durability: Medium — DC ramp is real but auto-sensing is the larger, more cyclical base.

assessments.role: NVDA GPU power-stage socket leader; Enterprise Data +97.7% YoY, named silicon partner on 800V/1MW-rack.
assessments.scale_rationale: Premier execution and a real socket win (Enterprise Data +97.7% YoY) — a strong LEVER, but the franchise is more contested than it looks. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS with a material moat fix (MPS is one of ~14 co-named 800V silicon providers; TI launched a 'complete 800VDC with NVIDIA' architecture; flat gross margin = no pricing power), so a ~12pt haircut off a ~64 franchise. Catalyst FIRED and trades ~25% above base ~$1,250 (~2:1 against) — that richness is in valuation_posture; size smaller and wait.
assessments.demand_durability: High — GPU power socket is tightly capex-bolted, but the socket is contested/commoditizing.

assessments.role: High-density 48V/factorized power-conversion modules for AI racks; differentiated but small and contested.
assessments.scale_rationale: Real differentiated tech (factorized power, ITC exclusion order, B:B>2.0, backlog +70% QoQ) but small and losing socket share to MPWR/merchant silicon is the live franchise risk — a TACTICAL expression. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, and the headline correction cuts FOR the name (the bear's '$27.3M tax benefit' earnings-quality kill was a ~100x digit-transposition; Q1 was operationally earned), so a small ~8pt haircut off a ~48 franchise. The run already happened (base ~$215 is ~34% below spot, ~107x P/E) — that lives in valuation_posture; wait.
assessments.demand_durability: Medium — AI-rack power modules, but losing socket share to MPWR/merchant silicon is the live risk.

assessments.role: GaN aux-power for NVDA Kyber 800VDC reference designs; design-ins not yet booked production.
assessments.scale_rationale: Real aux-socket design-ins (DER-1110/DER-1114 for Kyber) but they are reference designs / 15-35W aux 'housekeeping' sockets, not the main 800V power, with near-zero DC revenue today and main-power GaN 'a couple years out' — a speculative TACTICAL franchise. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, corrections minor and bear-reinforcing (gross margin even softer; one of several NVIDIA suppliers, not sole-source), ~8pt haircut off a ~43 franchise. Base ~$61 is ~30% below spot; wait.
assessments.demand_durability: Medium — aux-power design-ins are early and not the primary 800V socket; broad-consumer base.

assessments.role: GaN/SiC hopeful claiming the NVDA 800V socket — but multi-sourced alongside IFNNY/Navitas, revenue shrinking, serially diluting.
assessments.scale_rationale: Skeptic verdict REFUTED — the load-bearing sole-source 800V claim is FALSE (explicit multi-vendor MGX collaboration; Infineon named on the identical socket); Q1 revenue -39% YoY, a $500M ATM (~9-19% dilution) on top of a completed $122M ATM, GAAP-gross-negative (-9.3% GM), ~100x+ forward sales. A REFUTED verdict forces PASS and a sub-35 score; with revenue shrinking, the balance sheet diluting, and base ~$11.50 ~52% below spot, this is a clear PASS.
assessments.demand_durability: Low — revenue declining, no sole-source lock, micro-cap with a diluting balance sheet.

assessments.role: Cheapest way to own the dispatchable+nuclear power every AI dollar pays for; ~41 GW in the two highest-load-growth US markets, ~3,800 MW of 20-yr nuclear PPAs (Meta/AWS).
assessments.scale_rationale: The single best risk/reward in the whole 45-name complex and a CORE franchise (~86): firm dispatchable + nuclear under 20-yr hyperscaler PPAs in the highest-load-growth US markets, plus the Cogentrix optionality excluded from guidance. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, and the correction cuts FOR the thesis — the bull's '+22% YoY / re-rate already fired' premise was FALSE; VST is actually DOWN ~7.5% YoY, ~25% off its high, i.e. the re-rate has NOT fired here — so only a ~4pt haircut. Base ~$165 ~at spot, bull +22-31%; the merchant tail and ~330% D/E are the offsets (in valuation_posture, not the conviction). This is the CORE I would seat at full weight today — enter_now_carry. [Honesty note: at ~$164 VST is FAIR to its own $160-170 SoP (+0.8%), NOT cheap on the absolute number — the 'cheap'/priority read is RELATIVE (cheapest of the power-gen cluster, ~26% off its 52wk high, below the 200-DMA), i.e. a drawdown-staging entry, not an absolute-SoP discount.]
assessments.demand_durability: Very high — firm dispatchable + nuclear power under 20-yr hyperscaler PPAs in load-growth markets; merchant tail and ~330% D/E are the offsets.
assessments.valuation_posture: fair vs SoP ($160-170, +0.8%); cheap only relative (-26% off 52wk high, <200-DMA)

assessments.role: Single best-positioned firm-power supplier — 32.4 GW NRC-licensed nuclear, Meta/Clinton + Microsoft/Crane PPAs, Calpine closed.
assessments.scale_rationale: Irreplaceable scarcity (already-built licensed nuclear, the scarcest asset in the layer) and the purest nuclear-IPP toll after VST — a true CORE franchise (~85). Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, corrections are footnotes that REINFORCE the wait-stance (mcap higher so FCF yield thinner; de-rating already underway, ~34% off the high, below 50/200-DMA), so a ~8pt haircut. Catalyst FIRED (all three load-bearing events printed), base ~$260 ~5% below spot — seat-on-weakness, the least-redundant nuclear name after VST.
assessments.demand_durability: Very high — licensed nuclear under long PPAs; the scarcest asset in the layer.

assessments.role: Scarce grid-connected nuclear-IPP (2.2 GW Susquehanna) in supply-starved PJM; AWS PPA anchor.
assessments.scale_rationale: Real scarce-asset franchise (2.2 GW Susquehanna, AWS 1,920 MW FTM through 2042, Cornerstone 2,451 MW pending) — a strong LEVER, duplicative of VST/CEG within nuclear-IPP and with thinner contracting/more leverage. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, the only correction is a cosmetic note-rate detail (the '1+ GW pipeline' is verified still UNSIGNED, reinforcing the bear), so a ~8pt haircut off a ~64 franchise. The AWS re-rate is spent; base ~$415 ~5% below spot; wait.
assessments.demand_durability: High — nuclear baseload in PJM, but more leverage and a thinner contracted book than CEG/VST.

assessments.role: Irreplaceable Western uranium fuel + Westinghouse/AP1000 reactor layer; the only liquid pure-play fuel toll.
assessments.scale_rationale: Genuine fuel-cycle moat (the only liquid pure-play fuel toll + Westinghouse/AP1000 layer) — a strong LEVER, though commodity-priced and one step removed from the AI bolt. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, corrections are valuation footnotes that make the bear MORE conservative (EV/EBITDA ~76x not ~50x; the $80B AP1000 value-realization is pre-FID and dilutive), so a ~8pt haircut off a ~60 franchise. Catalyst FIRED (+106% TTM), base ~$77 is ~28% below spot; wait.
assessments.demand_durability: High — uranium demand is structural, but commodity-priced and the AI link is one-step-removed.

assessments.role: Highest-profile SMR pure-play; DOE pilot + July-4-2026 criticality milestone, ~14 GW of LOIs (Meta leg binding-prepay).
assessments.scale_rationale: Real dated regulatory lead and a wide-distribution option (DOE Reactor Pilot, July-4-2026 criticality target, INL first-power late-2027) — but pre-revenue, so a TACTICAL option not a CORE holding; size as an option, not a position. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, and the correction cuts FOR the name (the Meta 1.2 GW leg is a BINDING prepayment agreement, more committed than an LOI), so a small ~6pt haircut. Best of the speculative SMRs (top of the pre-revenue band, just sub-35 by the pre-revenue rule); base ~$57 ~at spot, bull +65% / bear -44%.
assessments.demand_durability: Low-now/high-optional — pre-revenue; the Meta leg is a binding prepay, the Switch 12 GW is non-binding; first ops ~late-2027.

assessments.role: Naval-nuclear + HALEU/microreactor component manufacturer; the established fuel/component arm behind the SMR wave.
assessments.scale_rationale: Real, profitable, established (unlike the SMR hopefuls — $8.65B backlog, commercial rev +121%) — a genuine TACTICAL-to-low-LEVER franchise anchored by a durable defense-funded naval base. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS with a material AI-thesis fix: the Tennessee enrichment facility is HEU for the Navy (defense, ~2035 operational, NRC pre-application only), NOT commercial HALEU for AI-power — so it must come OUT of the priced-in AI optionality — a load-bearing ~14pt haircut off a ~55 franchise. The naval base is durable but the AI-SMR leg is third-party-deployment-dependent; base ~$192 ~6% below spot, no asymmetry; wait.
assessments.demand_durability: Medium-high — naval base is durable/defense-funded; the AI-SMR leg is third-party-deployment-dependent and the TN enrichment is defense, not commercial.

assessments.role: Domestic HALEU enrichment (the only US producer); $900M DOE task order + Oklo LOI.
assessments.scale_rationale: Strategically scarce (sole US HALEU enricher, $3.9B backlog) — a real TACTICAL franchise on national-security scarcity, but revenue hinges on un-finalized contracts, so it stays speculative. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, and the correction cuts mildly FOR the name (Q1 revenue actually GREW ~5%, not flat; FY26 guide raised to $450-500M), so a ~8pt haircut off a ~42 franchise. The load-bearing catalysts are non-binding (DOE order needs a definitive agreement; Oklo is an LOI with 2029 deliveries), base ~$150 ~22% below spot; wait.
assessments.demand_durability: Low-now/high-optional — revenue hinges on un-finalized government/SMR contracts.

assessments.role: Solid-oxide fuel-cell on-site power for data centers; behind-the-meter generation hopeful (Oracle 2.8 GW).
assessments.scale_rationale: Real DC fuel-cell traction (Oracle up to 2.8 GW, ~$20B backlog, FY26 guide raised) but unproven economics and a price that embeds perfection keep it a TACTICAL franchise. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS with a material balance-sheet flip: the bull's '~$461M net cash' is WRONG — the Q1 10-Q shows ~$84M NET DEBT — so the 'self-funds the scale-up without dilution' pillar is weaker and dilution risk higher — a load-bearing ~15pt haircut off a ~42 franchise. Deeply unfavorable at spot (base ~$167 is ~49% below spot, ~320x EV/EBITDA); wait.
assessments.demand_durability: Medium — DC fuel cells are a real niche, but unproven economics and a net-debt balance sheet that embeds perfection.

assessments.role: Pre-commercial Xe-100 SMR + TRISO fuel developer; first NRC Part-70 fuel facility license.
assessments.scale_rationale: Pre-commercial, optionality only: revenue is DOE grant/cost-share income (not product sales), first power early-2030s, the 11.5 GWe pipeline is explicitly contingent — low franchise centrality (~22). Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, corrections net bear-reinforcing (lockup accelerated to Sep-1-2026, earlier overhang), so a haircut leaves it a PASS. Base ~$16 is ~26% below spot, more speculative and earlier than OKLO.
assessments.demand_durability: Low — pre-commercial, no deployed reactors, optionality only.

assessments.role: NuScale SMR developer; binary on the RoPower/PPA pipeline, ENTRA1 cash flows OUT.
assessments.scale_rationale: Binary with a fat left tail and low franchise centrality (~20): base ~$7 is ~40% below spot, $3.3-3.5 cash floor if the PPA slips. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, and the corrections WORSEN it materially — the ENTRA1 economics flow OUT of NuScale (paid ~$495M Q3-25, potential >$3B milestone payments), there is an active securities-fraud class action, and TVA's first US SMR is GE-Hitachi's BWRX-300, not NuScale — a load-bearing haircut that confirms PASS.
assessments.demand_durability: Low — binary on a single pipeline; NuScale is the payer to ENTRA1, not yet the contracted payee.

assessments.role: Nano Nuclear micro-reactor developer; KRONOS Part-50 prototype CPA accepted for NRC review, value-realization ~2030.
assessments.scale_rationale: Pre-revenue micro-cap with ZERO binding offtake (all MOUs non-binding) and a Part-50 prototype filing (commercial fleet needs a future Part-53/57 framework) — value-realization ~2030, low franchise centrality (~18). Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, and the correction is a mild de-risk (NRC formally ACCEPTED the CPA for review 2026-05-20; the $400M ATM is armed but UNDRAWN), so a ~6pt haircut still leaves a PASS. Base ~$24 ~14% below spot; value-realizing event years out.
assessments.demand_durability: Low — pre-revenue, multi-year regulatory runway before any bolted revenue.

assessments.role: The only US HBM supplier (HBM4 Vera-Rubin certified, smallest of three allocations); the memory toll on every AI accelerator.
assessments.scale_rationale: Genuine AI-memory franchise transformation (only US HBM supplier, HBM4 Vera-Rubin certified) — a real LEVER, but it remains a CYCLICAL at heart (certified as the SMALLEST of three HBM4 suppliers; DRAM/NAND cyclicality is the historic killer), which caps the franchise score below the durable tolls. Skeptic verdict CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, the correction is a date footnote (Q2 reported Mar-18, not Feb; net-cash figure unverified but not load-bearing), so a ~8pt haircut off a ~56 franchise. The June-24 print is a PENDING_HARD binary; base ~$820-900 is ~22-28% below spot (peak-margin risk, in valuation_posture); size small and wait.
assessments.demand_durability: Medium-high now / cyclical structurally — HBM demand is capex-bolted, but DRAM/NAND cyclicality is the historic killer and the price embeds peak margins as durable.

correlation_memo: ONE BET IN SIX COSTUMES. The single shared macro factor under all 45 names is AI-capex durability (~$725B/2026 hyperscaler spend, ~40% of S&P EPS growth). A hyperscaler capex guide-down or monetization scare (CATALYST_WATCH §5 tripwire) de-grosses every layer simultaneously — there is no diversification inside this book, only the illusion of it across six sub-industries. Treat the whole complex as a single position and cap it at the LAYER level. Intra-layer clusters that share the SAME resolution driver (and are therefore mutually redundant): (A-OPTICAL) COHR + LITE + FN + CRDO + MRVL + GLW are all the NVDA/hyperscaler optical-supply node — a 1.6T transceiver ASP cut or an optical design-loss hits all six together; COHR and FN are the PUREST/least-redundant (vertically-integrated platform + the contract factory), LITE/MTSI/AAOI are duplicative second-tier transceiver exposure, POET/ALAB are the speculative tail. (B-GRID) ETN + VRT + GEV + PWR + POWL + HUBB + ABB + NVT all resolve on the SAME grid/electrical-capex cycle; ETN and GEV are the PUREST full-stack tolls, VRT is the highest-beta single-factor proxy (own ONE of VRT/ETN, not both), NVT/ATKR/MYRG are duplicative/weak. (C-THERMAL) MOD + FIX + EME + CARR + JCI are the cooling/contractor cluster on the SAME data-center build-rate; MOD is the PUREST pure-play and EME the highest-quality contractor — FIX is duplicative of EME, CARR/JCI are diluted broad-HVAC. (D-PWR-SEMI) the SiC pair ON + IFNNY share the auto-EV + AI-DC power double-secular and the SAME NVDA 800V socket (IFNNY is also the multi-source winner over NVTS); MPWR + VICR + POWI + NVTS all compete for the SAME GPU/rack power-stage socket — own ON (cheapest, broadest) and IFNNY, treat the rest as one contested socket. (E-POWER-GEN) VST + CEG + TLN + CCJ are the nuclear-IPP/uranium cluster on the SAME firm-power-PPA + uranium driver (VST and CEG are the PUREST liquid tolls; TLN duplicative, CCJ one-step-removed commodity); OKLO + SMR + XE + NNE + LEU + BWXT + BE are the pre-revenue SMR/fuel option cluster, all binary on the SAME regulatory/PPA-conversion timeline — own at most ONE (OKLO) as an option. (F-MEMORY) MU is alone but stacks AI-capex leverage ON TOP of the DRAM/HBM cycle — double-levered, not diversifying. NET: a concentrated scale-out book should hold ~6-8 names MAX across all six layers (one or two purest tolls per layer), because adding a second name per layer buys correlation, not diversification — the resolution driver is identical.
memo: SEAT TODAY (asymmetry or moat survives a digestion air-pocket): VST is the only name in the complex with genuine present asymmetry — the Skeptic proved its re-rate has NOT fired (down ~7.5% YoY, ~25% off its high), it sits at base-case fair value with +22-31% bull upside, and the verdict-correction cuts FOR the thesis (CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, the correction is bull-supportive); it is the highest-conviction franchise in the book at 82, enter_now_carry. After that I scale_in (not full size) to the purest least-redundant toll per layer where the price is least-stretched and the moat is structural: the six purest CORE tolls — CEG (scarcest licensed nuclear), GEV (full-stack power), ETN (broadest grid stack, ~fair), ON (cheapest broad power-semi, at fair value), COHR/FN (the optical-supply node), MOD (cleanest thermal) — all now read at their true CORE franchise level (72-80) net of modest verdict-based correction haircuts, scaled in on weakness. HOLD-FOR-WEAKNESS (strong franchises, fired catalysts, no current asymmetry — the bulk of the book): MRVL, CRDO, GLW, LITE, MTSI, SMTC, VRT, PWR, POWL, HUBB, ABB, NVT, EME, FIX, CARR, JCI, IFNNY, ALGM, MPWR, VICR, POWI, TLN, CCJ, OKLO, BWXT, LEU, BE, MU — wait for the §5 AI-capex-flush tripwire to restore margin of safety. AVOID/PASS (weak fit, refuted, pre-revenue, or asymmetric to the downside): NVTS (Skeptic-REFUTED, multi-sourced + shrinking + diluting), MYRG (REFUTED — the bear anchor was stale, but a REFUTED verdict forces sub-35 TACTICAL and the residual valuation-stretch + B2B<1.0x stands), POET / AAOI (over-extended optical tail), ATKR (commodity, net-debt + antitrust cash drain), XE / SMR / NNE (pre-revenue SMRs asymmetric to the downside). ROTATION DISCIPLINE: the asymmetry is NOT broadly there now — 42/45 trade above base-case SoP and the catalysts are overwhelmingly FIRED, so this is a wait-and-accumulate-on-weakness theme, not a chase. The honest move is a small VST-anchored CORE plus a shopping list, sized at roughly half a normal theme weight because the whole book is one AI-capex bet. CONVICTION-SCALE NOTE: scale_conviction reads franchise-centrality on a PM-intuitive 0-100 axis (CORE 70-92 / LEVER 45-69 / TACTICAL 35-54 / PASS <35). The Skeptic is adversarial by construction, so it is applied as a VERDICT-BASED DEMOTION — CONFIRMED takes no haircut (so MRVL/VRT/POWL read at their full franchise scores), CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS takes an 8-18pt haircut sized to how load-bearing the correction is, and REFUTED forces sub-35 (NVTS/MYRG) — NOT as a hard numeric ceiling. That is why the six purest CORE tolls now correctly print 72-80 rather than being pinned at a conservative cap. Valuation/already-ran is NOT in this number — it lives only in valuation_posture (mostly 'rich') and expected_return_pct (mostly negative).
